layout.tagline: Fresh fruits, reliable quality, quick counter billing
layout.footer: Amma Fruit Shop - billing counter system for daily sales.

home.title: Pick fruits and bill in minutes
home.description: Search fruits, set quantity in kg, and generate invoice plus payment QR instantly.

cards.frontendBody: Fruit grid, quantity selection, cart, checkout, invoice preview, and QR payment flow are enabled.
cards.backendBody: Stock tracking, order records, payment confirmation, analytics, and secure admin APIs are active.
cards.nextBody: Connect Meta Cloud API credentials to send invoice and QR directly to customer WhatsApp.

homePage.title: Fresh Fruits Delivered Fast
homePage.description: Select quantity in kilograms, see live pricing, and add to cart instantly.
homePage.infoParagraphOne: Tamil Nadu is one of India's leading fruit-growing states, known for mango, banana, guava, sapota, and jackfruit. Its warm climate and long growing season support fresh, flavorful fruit supply across most months.
homePage.infoParagraphTwo: Indian fruits vary by region and season, with tropical produce in the south, citrus and grapes in the west, and temperate fruits in northern belts. Choosing seasonal Indian fruits usually means better taste, freshness, and value.

cartPage.title: Your Cart
cartPage.emptyDescription: Your cart is empty. Add fruits from the home page.
cartPage.paymentHint: Choose Cash or Online in checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emptyDescription: Empty cart cannot checkout. Add fruits to continue.
checkout.whatsappInvalid: Invalid WhatsApp number format. Use 10-digit India number or country code format.
checkout.cashHint: After submit, invoice and thank-you message will be sent to the customer WhatsApp number.
checkout.onlineHint: After submit, payment QR, UPI details, invoice, and thank-you message will be sent to the customer WhatsApp number.
checkout.outdatedItemsError: Some items were outdated or unavailable and removed from cart. Please review and place order again.
checkout.stockChangedError: Stock changed for one or more fruits. Quantities were updated. Please place order again.
checkout.noValidItemsError: Cart has no valid items. Please add fruits and retry.
checkout.invalidCartDataError: Cart has invalid item data. Please clear cart and add fruits again.
checkout.oldCartError: Cart contains old fruit items from a previous session. Please re-add fruits and place order again.
checkout.placeOrderError: Failed to place order. Please retry.

success.title: Order Confirmed
success.description: Thank you for ordering from Amma Fruit Shop. Your order has been placed successfully.
success.onlinePendingNote: Payment remains pending until confirmed by Amma Fruit Shop.
success.cashNote: Invoice and thank-you message are sent to the customer WhatsApp number.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The route you requested does not exist yet.
